name: Blueberry Crunch Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and beat well.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) to the wet mixture alternately with milk and vanilla extract.
4. Mix in the blueberries.
5. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 9 square baking pan.
6. Prepare the topping by combining butter, sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
7. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the blueberries.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
